hero.summary_en: The reviewed federation route remains link-only until stable upcoming meeting rows are published.

paragraphs_en: Horse Racing Federation of Nigeria system is the reviewed racing-system context.
The federation is identified, while current racecourse and meeting coverage remain unconfirmed.
paragraphs_ja: ナイジェリア競馬連盟体系を確認済み競馬体系文脈として扱う。
